name: house-medium-family
summary: A middle-class family's main room — hearth, table for six, a few treasured possessions on a shelf. Lived-in but tidy.

primary_palette.note: hearth-centered family dinner — the table is the gathering point
evening hearthside — quiet hour, mending and stories
larger family or boarder house — bench seating, communal
young family — nursing chair by the fire, baby sleeping

story_prompts: mid-meal — a place set for someone who hasn't come home
tidy, empty — the family is at market, back by dusk
holiday night — table extended with a borrowed board, wreath on the door
grieving household — the father's chair left empty, his cup still on the shelf
contested inheritance — two sets of possessions uneasily sharing one room

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: warm moderate (0.4-0.5) — hearth plus candles or a shuttered window

anti_patterns: not a single-person room — spaces show multiple occupants (mismatched chairs, multiple mugs, toys)
avoid luxury props — no gold, no crystal, no velvet. Wool and pewter.
don't over-clutter — this is a cared-for home, not a hovel
